About Thrive

Not a reseller.
A specialist.

Thrive is the official HPO.TECH worldwide specialist, founded and run from a working hyperbaric clinic in Bath. You buy the chamber at the same price as going direct - what you gain is a team that uses these chambers every day.

Get a quote Read the buying guide
How it started

It began with a diagnosis, not a catalogue.

When David Gumbleton's father was diagnosed with Alzheimer's, conventional medicine offered little beyond managing the symptoms. David went looking for anything that might help, and the search led him to hyperbaric oxygen - then deep into the research behind it, to understand it properly.

What he found convinced him it deserved to be done right. He opened Thrive Bath, one of the UK's first dedicated hyperbaric clinics, and has run chambers there every day since, working alongside an elite sports team, Bath Rugby. When he came across HPO.TECH, the chambers were finally built to the standard the clinic demanded. Thrive Hyperbaric grew from there.

David went through the full range of hyperbaric chambers. Only HPO.TECH met the standard.
The manufacturer

Built by HPO.TECH, in Istanbul.

The chambers are engineered and built by HPO.TECH at their own facility in Istanbul - every unit made in-house, under their own quality control and protected by their own patents.

They're built to the standards that matter: CE marking and ISO 13485 medical-device quality, PED pressure-equipment certification, ASME PVHO for vessels that hold people under pressure, and independent inspection by Türk Loydu before each unit leaves the factory.

HPO.TECH also supply hospitals, and hold medical-device approval for their chambers across a range of countries - among them the EU, the UAE, Saudi Arabia and Malaysia.

We work hand in hand with HPO.TECH on every project - specification, customisation, installation and training - so you get the manufacturer's engineering and the manufacturer's price, with a specialist team managing the detail around it. That combination is the strongest way to own one.

See the certifications
Why buy through Thrive

Three things a reseller can't give you.

Most hyperbaric chambers are sold by resellers working from a catalogue. Thrive is the opposite - and it changes the whole experience of owning one.

01 · We run one

Advice from use, not a spec sheet

Our clinic runs these chambers every day, so you're asking someone who lives with one - not a sales desk reading a brochure.

  • Specification advice from daily operators
  • Honest guidance on model, pressure and fit
  • Sit in a working chamber at our Bath clinic
02 · We handle all of it

The whole project, managed

From the first drawing to the day it runs, we manage everything that gets a chamber in and working.

  • Installation planning, shipping and customs
  • Customisation, finishes and 3D room drawings
  • Regulatory guidance and operator training
  • A protocol framework to run it
03 · At no extra cost

The same price as direct

You pay HPO.TECH exactly what you would pay going direct. The specialist layer around it is what Thrive adds.

  • The manufacturer's direct price, nothing added
  • Direct liaison with HPO.TECH in Istanbul on your behalf
  • English-speaking support across time zones
See one in person

Try one before you buy, wherever you are.

HPO.TECH chambers are installed and running all over the world - most of them in the US, where we work with install and servicing teams run from Detroit, Michigan - so there's very likely one you can visit near you. Tell us where you are and we'll arrange it.

Or come to the source: our own clinic in Bath runs these chambers every day, and you're welcome to experience a full session yourself - working, not staged.

Visit the Bath clinic
How we work

An emerging field, done honestly.

Hyperbaric oxygen for healthy people is a field near the start of what it will become - which is exactly why it's worth doing carefully. We'd rather be the most accurate voice than the loudest one: clear about what the research shows, clear about what it doesn't, and focused on only supplying chambers that meet the highest engineering and safety standards.

Start with a conversation.

Tell us your space, how you'll use it and where you are. We'll tell you exactly how it happens - and what it costs.
